personal.preferred_title: Dynatrace Instrumentation Engineer | APM, EUM & Telemetry Analysis

summary: Dynatrace Instrumentation Engineer with strong experience in enterprise APM, synthetic monitoring, end-user monitoring, transaction tracing, telemetry analysis, dashboards, and performance reporting. Hands-on background with Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics, CA APM, BMC TrueSight/TSCO, AppDynamics, Python scripting, shell automation, and cloud-aligned monitoring workflows. Experienced supporting application performance monitoring, trend analysis, operational visibility, and technical input for monitoring solution development.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built automated telemetry ingestion and ETL pipelines with Python/Pandas for 6,000+ monitored endpoints using BMC TrueSight/TSCO.
Integrated monitoring feeds from TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting layers for operational visibility and performance analysis.
Created dashboards and reporting workflows with Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly for capacity insights, telemetry trends, and stakeholder reporting.
Designed hybrid AWS/Oracle telemetry platforms using S3, Glue, and Redshift to support scalable monitoring data processing and analytics workloads.
Developed telemetry analysis and forecasting workflows supporting proactive infrastructure monitoring, capacity planning, and data trend analysis.
Used ServiceNow at user level for incident/change workflow tracking and operational reporting in enterprise support environments.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality production systems.
Implemented End-User Monitoring (EUM), end-to-end transaction tracing, and application performance visibility across web and mobile platforms.
Led FAST project, data-mining real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities for engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 with TLS 1.2 enforcement and zero regression in production monitoring.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace for unified load-test correlation, APM visibility, and performance analysis.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed CA APM for TIAA-CREF, overseeing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000-6,000 instrumented agents enterprise-wide.
Led CA APM upgrades from 9.1 to 10.1 with zero unplanned downtime, coordinating cross-functional IT teams.
Designed custom Management Modules for dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and enterprise monitoring standards.
Built Perl/Ksh scripts for automated telemetry extraction and performance reporting, replacing manual reporting processes.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic teams to resolve performance bottlenecks using APM telemetry insights and monitoring data.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (Glue, Athena, S3, Redshift), PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design & Optimization
skills.AI/ML: Capacity Forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, Telemetry Analysis
skills.Tools & Infra: Dynatrace (AppMon, Synthetics, EUM/RUM, Transaction Tracing), BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, ServiceNow reporting and ITSM workflows, Docker, Git, Airflow, Streamlit, Linux/Unix
skills.Legacy: C++, Java, PL/SQL, Oracle RAC, WebLogic / WebSphere, VB6 / VC++

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Data-mined real-user performance metrics with Dynatrace and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to optimize critical systems, improve APM visibility, and provide actionable observability insights for engineering teams.

projects.name: HorizonScale - Capacity & Telemetry Analytics Engine
projects.description: Developed telemetry analytics and forecasting workflows with Python and PySpark, reducing forecasting cycles by 90% while improving operational visibility through interactive dashboards.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform with S3, Glue, Athena, and Redshift patterns supporting scalable telemetry processing, reporting, and analytics workloads.
